| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The Lord is King; he is clothed with glory; the Lord is clothed with strength; power is the cord of his robe; the world is fixed, so that it may not be moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The seat of your power has been from the past; you are eternal. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The rivers send up, O Lord, the rivers send up their voices; they send them up with a loud cry. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The Lord in heaven is stronger than the noise of great waters, yes, he is stronger than the great waves of the sea. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Your witness is most certain; it is right for your house to be holy, O Lord, for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
